chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR. Criminal Misc Application No. S- 08 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution. 12.02.2024. Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, D.P.G. -.-.-. Learned counsel for the applicant does not press this criminal Misc. Application for cancellation of bail of respondents and seeks directions to the trial Court to expedite the case. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General has no objection to the above proposal. Accordingly this criminal Misc. application is dismissed as not pressed. The trial Court is directed to expedite the trial and conclude it within two months without fail. The Criminal Misc. Application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Irfan/PA
